ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: 90% potatoes, 5% sunflower oil, 5% spicy breading (wheat flour, rice flour, wheat starch, salt, yeast extract, dextrose, spice extract, baking powders: diphosphates, sodium carbonates, thickener: xanthan gum, antioxidant: rosemary extracts),
